hooks.command: n=$(cat .claude/cache/last-ground.txt 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$n" -gt 50 ]; then echo 0 > .claude/cache/last-ground.txt; printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"Stop","additionalContext":"Re-grounding check: %s tool uses since last refresh. Re-read .mind/active.md, .spec/covenant.yaml, and .mind/intent.yaml before continuing. Are your current actions still aligned with the intent? If you have drifted, course-correct now."}}' "$n"; fi
